member.name: T:AdbSharp.Transport.Usb.AndroidUsbClass
member.summary: Android USB interface classification helpers.

member.name: F:AdbSharp.Transport.Usb.AndroidUsbClass.VendorSpecificClass
member.summary: Android vendor-specific interface class.

member.name: F:AdbSharp.Transport.Usb.AndroidUsbClass.AndroidSubClass
member.summary: Android vendor-specific subclass used by ADB and Fastboot.

member.name: F:AdbSharp.Transport.Usb.AndroidUsbClass.AdbProtocol
member.summary: ADB interface protocol value.

member.name: F:AdbSharp.Transport.Usb.AndroidUsbClass.FastbootProtocol
member.summary: Fastboot interface protocol value.

member.name: M:AdbSharp.Transport.Usb.AndroidUsbClass.Classify(AdbSharp.Common.Devices.UsbDeviceDescriptor)
member.summary: Classifies a USB descriptor into a device mode.

member.name: T:AdbSharp.Transport.Usb.IUsbDeviceEnumerator
member.summary: Enumerates Android-compatible USB interfaces on the current host.

member.name: M:AdbSharp.Transport.Usb.IUsbDeviceEnumerator.FindAsync(System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Finds USB descriptors that may expose ADB, Fastboot, or Fastbootd.

member.name: T:AdbSharp.Transport.Usb.IUsbDeviceLockOwnerReleaser
member.summary: Releases host processes that are holding USB device interfaces.

member.name: M:AdbSharp.Transport.Usb.IUsbDeviceLockOwnerReleaser.ReleaseAsync(AdbSharp.Transport.Usb.UsbDeviceLockOwner,AdbSharp.Transport.Usb.UsbDeviceLockReleaseOptions,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Attempts to release a detected lock owner.

member.name: T:AdbSharp.Transport.Usb.IUsbDeviceLockOwnerResolver
member.summary: Resolves host processes that may be holding a USB device interface open.

member.name: P:AdbSharp.Transport.Usb.IUsbDeviceLockOwnerResolver.PlatformName
member.summary: Gets the host platform name handled by the resolver.

member.name: M:AdbSharp.Transport.Usb.IUsbDeviceLockOwnerResolver.CanResolve(AdbSharp.Common.Devices.UsbDeviceDescriptor)
member.summary: Determines whether this resolver can inspect the specified USB descriptor.
member.returns: when this resolver can inspect the descriptor.

member.name: M:AdbSharp.Transport.Usb.IUsbDeviceLockOwnerResolver.ResolveAsync(AdbSharp.Common.Devices.UsbDeviceDescriptor,AdbSharp.Transport.Usb.UsbTransportException,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Resolves processes that may be holding the specified USB interface.
member.param: The open failure that triggered resolution, when available.

member.name: T:AdbSharp.Transport.Usb.IUsbTransport
member.summary: Represents an opened USB bulk transport for Android protocol traffic.

member.name: P:AdbSharp.Transport.Usb.IUsbTransport.Descriptor
member.summary: Gets the device descriptor associated with this transport.

member.name: P:AdbSharp.Transport.Usb.IUsbTransport.BulkInEndpoint
member.summary: Gets the selected bulk input endpoint.

member.name: P:AdbSharp.Transport.Usb.IUsbTransport.BulkOutEndpoint
member.summary: Gets the selected bulk output endpoint.

member.name: M:AdbSharp.Transport.Usb.IUsbTransport.ReadAsync(System.Memory{System.Byte},System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Reads bytes from the device.

member.name: M:AdbSharp.Transport.Usb.IUsbTransport.WriteAsync(System.ReadOnlyMemory{System.Byte},System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Writes bytes to the device.

member.name: M:AdbSharp.Transport.Usb.IUsbTransport.ResetAsync(System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Requests a USB-level reset for the opened transport.

member.name: M:AdbSharp.Transport.Usb.IUsbTransport.AbortAsync(System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Aborts pending I/O and invalidates this transport.

member.name: T:AdbSharp.Transport.Usb.IUsbTransportDiagnostics
member.summary: Provides structured diagnostics for an opened USB transport.

member.name: M:AdbSharp.Transport.Usb.IUsbTransportDiagnostics.GetDiagnosticSnapshot
member.summary: Gets a snapshot of transport diagnostics.

member.name: T:AdbSharp.Transport.Usb.IUsbTransportFactory
member.summary: Opens USB transports for descriptors produced by a matching enumerator.

member.name: P:AdbSharp.Transport.Usb.IUsbTransportFactory.PlatformName
member.summary: Gets the platform name handled by this factory.

member.name: M:AdbSharp.Transport.Usb.IUsbTransportFactory.CanOpen(AdbSharp.Common.Devices.UsbDeviceDescriptor)
member.summary: Determines whether this factory can open the specified descriptor.
member.returns: when the descriptor can be opened.

member.name: M:AdbSharp.Transport.Usb.IUsbTransportFactory.OpenAsync(AdbSharp.Common.Devices.UsbDeviceDescriptor,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Opens the selected USB transport.

member.name: T:AdbSharp.Transport.Usb.UsbDeviceLockConflictException
member.summary: Represents an open failure after opt-in USB lock owner handling was attempted.

member.name: M:AdbSharp.Transport.Usb.UsbDeviceLockConflictException.#ctor(AdbSharp.Transport.Usb.UsbTransportError,System.String,AdbSharp.Transport.Usb.UsbDeviceLockOwnerResolution,System.Collections.Generic.IReadOnlyList{AdbSharp.Transport.Usb.UsbDeviceLockReleaseResult},System.Exception)
member.summary: Represents an open failure after opt-in USB lock owner handling was attempted.

member.name: P:AdbSharp.Transport.Usb.UsbDeviceLockConflictException.Resolution
member.summary: Gets the owner resolution result.

member.name: P:AdbSharp.Transport.Usb.UsbDeviceLockConflictException.ReleaseResults
member.summary: Gets release attempts performed before the failure.

member.name: T:AdbSharp.Transport.Usb.UsbDeviceLockConflictHandler
member.summary: Opens USB transports with optional lock owner conflict handling.

member.name: M:AdbSharp.Transport.Usb.UsbDeviceLockConflictHandler.OpenAsync(AdbSharp.Transport.Usb.IUsbTransportFactory,AdbSharp.Common.Devices.UsbDeviceDescriptor,AdbSharp.Transport.Usb.UsbDeviceLockConflictOptions,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Opens a USB transport, optionally resolving and releasing lock owners when opening fails.

member.name: M:AdbSharp.Transport.Usb.UsbDeviceLockConflictHandler.IsLockLikeFailure(AdbSharp.Transport.Usb.UsbTransportException)
member.summary: Determines whether a USB transport error commonly indicates another process owns the interface.

member.name: T:AdbSharp.Transport.Usb.UsbDeviceLockConflictOptions
member.summary: Opt-in behavior for USB open failures caused by device locks.

member.name: P:AdbSharp.Transport.Usb.UsbDeviceLockConflictOptions.ResolveOwners
member.summary: Gets or sets a value indicating whether owner resolution should run when opening fails with a lock-like error.

member.name: P:AdbSharp.Transport.Usb.UsbDeviceLockConflictOptions.ReleaseAdbServer
member.summary: Gets or sets a value indicating whether detected ADB server owners should be released gracefully.

member.name: P:AdbSharp.Transport.Usb.UsbDeviceLockConflictOptions.RetryAfterRelease
member.summary: Gets or sets a value indicating whether the open should be retried after a successful release.

member.name: P:AdbSharp.Transport.Usb.UsbDeviceLockConflictOptions.RetryDelay
member.summary: Gets or sets the delay before retrying after a successful release.

member.name: P:AdbSharp.Transport.Usb.UsbDeviceLockConflictOptions.OwnerResolver
member.summary: Gets or sets an explicit owner resolver. When omitted, the resolver registry is used.

member.name: P:AdbSharp.Transport.Usb.UsbDeviceLockConflictOptions.OwnerReleaser
member.summary: Gets or sets an explicit owner releaser. When omitted, is used.

member.name: P:AdbSharp.Transport.Usb.UsbDeviceLockConflictOptions.ReleaseOptions
member.summary: Gets or sets release options used for automatic graceful ADB release.

member.name: T:AdbSharp.Transport.Usb.UsbDeviceLockOwner
member.summary: Describes a host process that may hold a USB device interface lock.
member.param: Short platform-specific evidence for the match.

member.name: M:AdbSharp.Transport.Usb.UsbDeviceLockOwner.#ctor(System.Int32,System.String,System.String,AdbSharp.Transport.Usb.UsbDeviceLockOwnerKind,AdbSharp.Transport.Usb.UsbDeviceLockOwnerConfidence,System.String)
member.summary: Describes a host process that may hold a USB device interface lock.
member.param: Short platform-specific evidence for the match.

member.name: P:AdbSharp.Transport.Usb.UsbDeviceLockOwner.ProcessId
member.summary: The host process identifier.

member.name: P:AdbSharp.Transport.Usb.UsbDeviceLockOwner.ProcessName
member.summary: The process name when available.

member.name: P:AdbSharp.Transport.Usb.UsbDeviceLockOwner.ExecutablePath
member.summary: The executable path when available.

member.name: P:AdbSharp.Transport.Usb.UsbDeviceLockOwner.Kind
member.summary: The detected owner kind.

member.name: P:AdbSharp.Transport.Usb.UsbDeviceLockOwner.Confidence
member.summary: The owner confidence level.

member.name: P:AdbSharp.Transport.Usb.UsbDeviceLockOwner.Evidence
member.summary: Short platform-specific evidence for the match.

member.name: P:AdbSharp.Transport.Usb.UsbDeviceLockOwner.SupportsGracefulAdbRelease
member.summary: Gets a value indicating whether this owner can be released through the ADB server protocol.

member.name: T:AdbSharp.Transport.Usb.UsbDeviceLockOwnerConfidence
member.summary: Describes how strongly a detected process is believed to own a USB device lock.

member.name: F:AdbSharp.Transport.Usb.UsbDeviceLockOwnerConfidence.Exact
member.summary: The process was matched to the exact platform device path or device node.

member.name: F:AdbSharp.Transport.Usb.UsbDeviceLockOwnerConfidence.High
member.summary: The process is highly likely to own the lock, but the platform could not prove an exact match.

member.name: F:AdbSharp.Transport.Usb.UsbDeviceLockOwnerConfidence.Medium
member.summary: The process is plausibly related to the lock.

member.name: F:AdbSharp.Transport.Usb.UsbDeviceLockOwnerConfidence.Low
member.summary: The process is weakly related to the lock.

member.name: T:AdbSharp.Transport.Usb.UsbDeviceLockOwnerKind
member.summary: Classifies a detected USB lock owner.

member.name: F:AdbSharp.Transport.Usb.UsbDeviceLockOwnerKind.Unknown
member.summary: The process kind is unknown.

member.name: F:AdbSharp.Transport.Usb.UsbDeviceLockOwnerKind.AdbServer
member.summary: The process appears to be an ADB server.

member.name: F:AdbSharp.Transport.Usb.UsbDeviceLockOwnerKind.Fastboot
member.summary: The process appears to be a Fastboot process.

member.name: F:AdbSharp.Transport.Usb.UsbDeviceLockOwnerKind.AndroidStudio
member.summary: The process appears to be Android Studio or a related helper process.

member.name: F:AdbSharp.Transport.Usb.UsbDeviceLockOwnerKind.Scrcpy
member.summary: The process appears to be scrcpy.

member.name: T:AdbSharp.Transport.Usb.UsbDeviceLockOwnerReleaser
member.summary: Default USB lock owner releaser.

member.name: P:AdbSharp.Transport.Usb.UsbDeviceLockOwnerReleaser.Default
member.summary: Gets the default lock owner releaser.

member.name: T:AdbSharp.Transport.Usb.UsbDeviceLockOwnerResolution
member.summary: Result of resolving host processes that may hold a USB device interface lock.
member.param: The platform device path or node that was inspected.

member.name: M:AdbSharp.Transport.Usb.UsbDeviceLockOwnerResolution.#ctor(AdbSharp.Common.Devices.UsbDeviceDescriptor,AdbSharp.Transport.Usb.UsbDeviceLockOwnerResolutionStatus,System.Collections.Generic.IReadOnlyList{AdbSharp.Transport.Usb.UsbDeviceLockOwner},System.String,System.String)
member.summary: Result of resolving host processes that may hold a USB device interface lock.
member.param: The platform device path or node that was inspected.

member.name: P:AdbSharp.Transport.Usb.UsbDeviceLockOwnerResolution.Descriptor
member.summary: The descriptor that was inspected.

member.name: P:AdbSharp.Transport.Usb.UsbDeviceLockOwnerResolution.Status
member.summary: The resolution status.

member.name: P:AdbSharp.Transport.Usb.UsbDeviceLockOwnerResolution.Owners
member.summary: Resolved owner processes.

member.name: P:AdbSharp.Transport.Usb.UsbDeviceLockOwnerResolution.DevicePath
member.summary: The platform device path or node that was inspected.

member.name: P:AdbSharp.Transport.Usb.UsbDeviceLockOwnerResolution.Message
member.summary: A diagnostic message.

member.name: M:AdbSharp.Transport.Usb.UsbDeviceLockOwnerResolution.Empty(AdbSharp.Common.Devices.UsbDeviceDescriptor,AdbSharp.Transport.Usb.UsbDeviceLockOwnerResolutionStatus,System.String,System.String)
member.summary: Creates a resolution with no owner results.
member.param: The platform device path or node that was inspected.

member.name: T:AdbSharp.Transport.Usb.UsbDeviceLockOwnerResolutionStatus
member.summary: Describes the outcome of resolving USB lock owners.

member.name: F:AdbSharp.Transport.Usb.UsbDeviceLockOwnerResolutionStatus.Resolved
member.summary: One or more owner processes were resolved.

member.name: F:AdbSharp.Transport.Usb.UsbDeviceLockOwnerResolutionStatus.NoOwnerFound
member.summary: Resolution completed and no owner process was found.

member.name: F:AdbSharp.Transport.Usb.UsbDeviceLockOwnerResolutionStatus.Unsupported
member.summary: The current host platform or descriptor is not supported by the resolver.

member.name: F:AdbSharp.Transport.Usb.UsbDeviceLockOwnerResolutionStatus.AccessDenied
member.summary: The host denied access to required process or device metadata.

member.name: F:AdbSharp.Transport.Usb.UsbDeviceLockOwnerResolutionStatus.Partial
member.summary: Resolution completed with partial results because some metadata was unavailable.

member.name: F:AdbSharp.Transport.Usb.UsbDeviceLockOwnerResolutionStatus.Failed
member.summary: Resolution failed unexpectedly.

member.name: T:AdbSharp.Transport.Usb.UsbDeviceLockOwnerResolverRegistry
member.summary: Process-wide registry for USB device lock owner resolvers.

member.name: M:AdbSharp.Transport.Usb.UsbDeviceLockOwnerResolverRegistry.RegisterResolver(AdbSharp.Transport.Usb.IUsbDeviceLockOwnerResolver)
member.summary: Registers a USB device lock owner resolver.

member.name: M:AdbSharp.Transport.Usb.UsbDeviceLockOwnerResolverRegistry.Clear
member.summary: Clears registered resolvers. Intended for tests and custom hosts.

member.name: M:AdbSharp.Transport.Usb.UsbDeviceLockOwnerResolverRegistry.FindResolver(AdbSharp.Common.Devices.UsbDeviceDescriptor)
member.summary: Finds a registered resolver for the descriptor.
member.returns: The matching resolver, or when no resolver matches.

member.name: M:AdbSharp.Transport.Usb.UsbDeviceLockOwnerResolverRegistry.ResolveAsync(AdbSharp.Common.Devices.UsbDeviceDescriptor,AdbSharp.Transport.Usb.UsbTransportException,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Resolves lock owners using the registered resolver for the descriptor.
member.param: The open failure that triggered resolution, when available.

member.name: T:AdbSharp.Transport.Usb.UsbDeviceLockReleaseKind
member.summary: Describes the release mechanism used for a USB lock owner.

member.name: F:AdbSharp.Transport.Usb.UsbDeviceLockReleaseKind.GracefulAdbServerKill
member.summary: The lock was released by sending a host kill request to the local ADB server.

member.name: F:AdbSharp.Transport.Usb.UsbDeviceLockReleaseKind.ProcessTerminate
member.summary: The lock was released by terminating the owner process.

member.name: T:AdbSharp.Transport.Usb.UsbDeviceLockReleaseOptions
member.summary: Options for releasing a detected USB device lock owner.

member.name: P:AdbSharp.Transport.Usb.UsbDeviceLockReleaseOptions.AllowGracefulAdbServerKill
member.summary: Gets or sets a value indicating whether ADB server owners should be released by the local ADB server protocol.

member.name: P:AdbSharp.Transport.Usb.UsbDeviceLockReleaseOptions.AllowProcessTermination
member.summary: Gets or sets a value indicating whether the releaser may terminate the owner process.

member.name: P:AdbSharp.Transport.Usb.UsbDeviceLockReleaseOptions.AdbServerHost
member.summary: Gets or sets the local ADB server host used for graceful ADB release.

member.name: P:AdbSharp.Transport.Usb.UsbDeviceLockReleaseOptions.AdbServerPort
member.summary: Gets or sets the local ADB server port used for graceful ADB release.

member.name: P:AdbSharp.Transport.Usb.UsbDeviceLockReleaseOptions.AdbServerTimeout
member.summary: Gets or sets the timeout used when contacting the local ADB server.

member.name: T:AdbSharp.Transport.Usb.UsbDeviceLockReleaseResult
member.summary: Result of attempting to release a USB lock owner.
member.param: The release mechanism that was attempted.

member.name: M:AdbSharp.Transport.Usb.UsbDeviceLockReleaseResult.#ctor(AdbSharp.Transport.Usb.UsbDeviceLockOwner,AdbSharp.Transport.Usb.UsbDeviceLockReleaseKind,System.Boolean,System.String,System.Exception)
member.summary: Result of attempting to release a USB lock owner.
member.param: The release mechanism that was attempted.

member.name: P:AdbSharp.Transport.Usb.UsbDeviceLockReleaseResult.Owner
member.summary: The owner that was targeted.

member.name: P:AdbSharp.Transport.Usb.UsbDeviceLockReleaseResult.Kind
member.summary: The release mechanism that was attempted.

member.name: P:AdbSharp.Transport.Usb.UsbDeviceLockReleaseResult.Succeeded
member.summary: Whether the release succeeded.

member.name: P:AdbSharp.Transport.Usb.UsbDeviceLockReleaseResult.Message
member.summary: A diagnostic message.

member.name: P:AdbSharp.Transport.Usb.UsbDeviceLockReleaseResult.Exception
member.summary: The underlying failure, when available.

member.name: T:AdbSharp.Transport.Usb.UsbDiscoveryIssue
member.summary: Describes a USB discovery issue reported by one registered enumerator.
member.param: The exception raised by the enumerator, when available.

member.name: M:AdbSharp.Transport.Usb.UsbDiscoveryIssue.#ctor(System.String,AdbSharp.Transport.Usb.UsbTransportError,System.String,System.Exception)
member.summary: Describes a USB discovery issue reported by one registered enumerator.
member.param: The exception raised by the enumerator, when available.

member.name: P:AdbSharp.Transport.Usb.UsbDiscoveryIssue.EnumeratorName
member.summary: The enumerator type name.

member.name: P:AdbSharp.Transport.Usb.UsbDiscoveryIssue.Error
member.summary: The platform-neutral USB error classification.

member.name: P:AdbSharp.Transport.Usb.UsbDiscoveryIssue.Message
member.summary: The diagnostic message.

member.name: P:AdbSharp.Transport.Usb.UsbDiscoveryIssue.Exception
member.summary: The exception raised by the enumerator, when available.

member.name: T:AdbSharp.Transport.Usb.UsbDiscoveryResult
member.summary: Contains USB descriptors and non-fatal discovery issues from all registered enumerators.
member.param: The descriptors returned by successful enumerators.
The discovery issues returned by failed enumerators.

member.name: M:AdbSharp.Transport.Usb.UsbDiscoveryResult.#ctor(System.Collections.Generic.IReadOnlyList{AdbSharp.Common.Devices.UsbDeviceDescriptor},System.Collections.Generic.IReadOnlyList{AdbSharp.Transport.Usb.UsbDiscoveryIssue})
member.summary: Contains USB descriptors and non-fatal discovery issues from all registered enumerators.
member.param: The descriptors returned by successful enumerators.
The discovery issues returned by failed enumerators.

member.name: P:AdbSharp.Transport.Usb.UsbDiscoveryResult.Devices
member.summary: The descriptors returned by successful enumerators.

member.name: P:AdbSharp.Transport.Usb.UsbDiscoveryResult.Issues
member.summary: The discovery issues returned by failed enumerators.

member.name: T:AdbSharp.Transport.Usb.UsbEndpointDirection
member.summary: USB endpoint direction.

member.name: F:AdbSharp.Transport.Usb.UsbEndpointDirection.Out
member.summary: Data flows from host to device.

member.name: F:AdbSharp.Transport.Usb.UsbEndpointDirection.In
member.summary: Data flows from device to host.

member.name: T:AdbSharp.Transport.Usb.UsbTransferKind
member.summary: USB endpoint transfer kind.

member.name: F:AdbSharp.Transport.Usb.UsbTransferKind.Bulk
member.summary: Bulk endpoint transfer.

member.name: T:AdbSharp.Transport.Usb.UsbEndpoint
member.summary: Describes a USB endpoint selected for Android protocol traffic.

member.name: M:AdbSharp.Transport.Usb.UsbEndpoint.#ctor(System.Byte,AdbSharp.Transport.Usb.UsbEndpointDirection,AdbSharp.Transport.Usb.UsbTransferKind,System.UInt16)
member.summary: Describes a USB endpoint selected for Android protocol traffic.

member.name: P:AdbSharp.Transport.Usb.UsbEndpoint.Address
member.summary: The endpoint address.

member.name: P:AdbSharp.Transport.Usb.UsbEndpoint.Direction
member.summary: The endpoint direction.

member.name: P:AdbSharp.Transport.Usb.UsbEndpoint.TransferKind
member.summary: The endpoint transfer kind.

member.name: P:AdbSharp.Transport.Usb.UsbEndpoint.MaxPacketSize
member.summary: The endpoint max packet size.

member.name: T:AdbSharp.Transport.Usb.UsbTransportDiagnosticSnapshot
member.summary: Structured diagnostics for an opened USB transport.
member.param: The bulk input endpoint max packet size.
The bulk output endpoint max packet size.
True when the transport is currently open.

member.name: M:AdbSharp.Transport.Usb.UsbTransportDiagnosticSnapshot.#ctor(System.String,System.String,System.Byte,System.UInt16,System.Byte,System.UInt16,System.Boolean,System.String,System.Collections.Generic.IReadOnlyDictionary{System.String,System.String})
member.summary: Structured diagnostics for an opened USB transport.
member.param: The bulk input endpoint max packet size.
The bulk output endpoint max packet size.
True when the transport is currently open.

member.name: P:AdbSharp.Transport.Usb.UsbTransportDiagnosticSnapshot.Backend
member.summary: The backend implementation name.

member.name: P:AdbSharp.Transport.Usb.UsbTransportDiagnosticSnapshot.TransportId
member.summary: The platform transport id.

member.name: P:AdbSharp.Transport.Usb.UsbTransportDiagnosticSnapshot.BulkInEndpointAddress
member.summary: The bulk input endpoint address.

member.name: P:AdbSharp.Transport.Usb.UsbTransportDiagnosticSnapshot.BulkInMaxPacketSize
member.summary: The bulk input endpoint max packet size.

member.name: P:AdbSharp.Transport.Usb.UsbTransportDiagnosticSnapshot.BulkOutEndpointAddress
member.summary: The bulk output endpoint address.

member.name: P:AdbSharp.Transport.Usb.UsbTransportDiagnosticSnapshot.BulkOutMaxPacketSize
member.summary: The bulk output endpoint max packet size.

member.name: P:AdbSharp.Transport.Usb.UsbTransportDiagnosticSnapshot.IsOpen
member.summary: True when the transport is currently open.

member.name: P:AdbSharp.Transport.Usb.UsbTransportDiagnosticSnapshot.State
member.summary: A backend-specific state summary.

member.name: P:AdbSharp.Transport.Usb.UsbTransportDiagnosticSnapshot.Properties
member.summary: Additional backend-specific diagnostic properties.

member.name: T:AdbSharp.Transport.Usb.UsbTransportError
member.summary: Classifies USB transport failures in a platform-neutral way.

member.name: F:AdbSharp.Transport.Usb.UsbTransportError.Unknown
member.summary: The failure could not be classified.

member.name: F:AdbSharp.Transport.Usb.UsbTransportError.PermissionDenied
member.summary: The host process does not have permission to access the USB interface.

member.name: F:AdbSharp.Transport.Usb.UsbTransportError.DeviceNotFound
member.summary: The selected USB device or interface was not found.

member.name: F:AdbSharp.Transport.Usb.UsbTransportError.DeviceDisconnected
member.summary: The device disconnected while an operation was in progress.

member.name: F:AdbSharp.Transport.Usb.UsbTransportError.EndpointStalled
member.summary: The USB endpoint stalled.

member.name: F:AdbSharp.Transport.Usb.UsbTransportError.Timeout
member.summary: The native USB operation timed out.

member.name: F:AdbSharp.Transport.Usb.UsbTransportError.Busy
member.summary: The device or interface is busy.

member.name: F:AdbSharp.Transport.Usb.UsbTransportError.ExclusiveAccess
member.summary: Another process has exclusive access to the device or interface.

member.name: F:AdbSharp.Transport.Usb.UsbTransportError.OperationAborted
member.summary: The operation was aborted by the operating system or driver.

member.name: F:AdbSharp.Transport.Usb.UsbTransportError.Io
member.summary: The native USB operation failed with a general I/O error.

member.name: F:AdbSharp.Transport.Usb.UsbTransportError.InvalidEndpoint
member.summary: The transport reported endpoint metadata that cannot support Android bulk protocol traffic.

member.name: F:AdbSharp.Transport.Usb.UsbTransportError.PlatformDependencyMissing
member.summary: A required platform USB dependency is missing.

member.name: T:AdbSharp.Transport.Usb.UsbTransportException
member.summary: Represents a USB transport failure.

member.name: M:AdbSharp.Transport.Usb.UsbTransportException.#ctor(System.String)
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the class.

member.name: M:AdbSharp.Transport.Usb.UsbTransportException.#ctor(System.String,System.Exception)
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the class.

member.name: M:AdbSharp.Transport.Usb.UsbTransportException.#ctor(AdbSharp.Transport.Usb.UsbTransportError,System.String)
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the class.

member.name: M:AdbSharp.Transport.Usb.UsbTransportException.#ctor(AdbSharp.Transport.Usb.UsbTransportError,System.String,System.Exception)
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the class.

member.name: P:AdbSharp.Transport.Usb.UsbTransportException.Error
member.summary: Gets the platform-neutral USB error classification.

member.name: T:AdbSharp.Transport.Usb.UsbTransportRegistry
member.summary: Process-wide registry for USB enumerators and transport factories.

member.name: M:AdbSharp.Transport.Usb.UsbTransportRegistry.RegisterEnumerator(AdbSharp.Transport.Usb.IUsbDeviceEnumerator)
member.summary: Registers a USB device enumerator.

member.name: M:AdbSharp.Transport.Usb.UsbTransportRegistry.RegisterFactory(AdbSharp.Transport.Usb.IUsbTransportFactory)
member.summary: Registers a USB transport factory.

member.name: M:AdbSharp.Transport.Usb.UsbTransportRegistry.Clear
member.summary: Clears registered transports. Intended for tests and custom hosts.

member.name: M:AdbSharp.Transport.Usb.UsbTransportRegistry.FindAsync(System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Enumerates registered USB device descriptors.
member.returns: The descriptors returned by all registered enumerators.

member.name: M:AdbSharp.Transport.Usb.UsbTransportRegistry.FindWithDiagnosticsAsync(System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Enumerates registered USB device descriptors and captures per-enumerator failures as diagnostics.
member.returns: Successful descriptors and discovery issues from failed enumerators.

member.name: M:AdbSharp.Transport.Usb.UsbTransportRegistry.FindFactory(AdbSharp.Common.Devices.UsbDeviceDescriptor)
member.summary: Finds a registered factory for the descriptor.
member.exception: No registered factory can open the descriptor.

member.name: T:AdbSharp.Transport.Usb.UsbTransportValidator
member.summary: Validates USB transport metadata before protocol clients use a transport.

member.name: M:AdbSharp.Transport.Usb.UsbTransportValidator.ValidateOpenedTransport(AdbSharp.Transport.Usb.IUsbTransport)
member.summary: Validates the metadata exposed by an opened Android USB transport.
member.exception: The transport does not expose a valid bulk IN/OUT endpoint pair.

member.name: M:AdbSharp.Transport.Usb.UsbTransportValidator.ValidateEndpointPair(AdbSharp.Transport.Usb.UsbEndpoint,AdbSharp.Transport.Usb.UsbEndpoint)
member.summary: Validates that two endpoints form an Android-compatible bulk IN/OUT pair.
member.exception: The endpoints do not form a valid Android bulk pair.
